items.name: Procore Data Layer Remediation Gate
items.purpose: Audit Waves 1-13 against Procore data-layer doctrine and create a remediation scope lock.

items.name: HB Central Projects Registry + Procore Mapping Contract
items.purpose: Define canonical project-to-Procore mapping using HB Central Projects as registry context, without overloading Projects.procoreProject.

items.name: Shared Procore Data Layer Models and Fixtures
items.purpose: Add shared TypeScript contracts and deterministic fixtures for object links, curated summaries, sync health, source lineage, derived signals, and freshness bands.

items.name: Backend Mock Adapter Boundary
items.purpose: Introduce backend Procore data-layer provider interfaces and mock-only read-model boundaries with no external calls.
primaryOutputs: GET-only PCC read-model route(s) if needed
runtime guard tests proving no Procore I/O

items.name: SPFx Fixture Integration Into Core Surfaces
items.purpose: Wire Procore-derived fixture signals into Project Home, Priority Actions, Project Readiness, External Systems, and Site Health surfaces through existing read-model seams.

items.name: Module Remediation and Closeout
items.purpose: Patch existing module docs/surfaces/tests for Procore source-lineage posture and close the remediation wave.
